Welcome to R P M development Group. Please listen carefully to the following menu as our options have changed. If you know your party's extension you may enter it at any time for a company directory by first name press nine for apartment rental please enter one or more letters of the person's first name. That name is not listed in the directory please enter one or more letters of the person's first name for Emily Martinez press one for Ed Marcel Leo press two for Ellen pick the tele press three for other options press four to enter a new name for extension one. Two eight press one for Diane the skin press two for Elizabeth bonaparte press three for other options press four to enter a new name for David Steinberg press one for all of the best call and it press two for Edward Mercedes press three for other options press four to enter a new name for. L C Cordero press one for. Emily my new press two for. Diana Plaza press three for other options press four to enter a new name for extension one five six press one for extension one. Five seven press two to enter a new name press the star key to exit press the pound key. Please enter one or more letters of the person's first name then press the pound key.
